acceptance_criteria.text: Production-runtime Agent Blueprint outreach smoke completes sourcing from new/unprocessed prospectingleads through approvals and queued_not_dispatched batch, then cleans fixtures.
proof: Smoke output success=true with source_artifact_status=hydrated and source_artifact_count=1
fixture_cleaned=true and follow-up DB cleanup query returned zero rows for smoke user/business/lead/blueprint/run
gaps: Smoke script was copied to /tmp inside the app container because /app/scripts is baked and stale.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc 'SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=/app/src python3 -B /tmp/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py'
known_gaps: Production image /app/scripts does not include the updated smoke script.
